# Column 2: col 44, rows 35-37, 41-43, 47-49
# Column 3: col 49, rows 35-37, 41-43, 47-49

# Click the vertical bars at col 44 and col 49

result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 44}])
print(f"Click vertical bar col 44: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check what changed
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCurrent right side bar area (rows 33-49, cols 33-56):")
for r in range(33, 50):
    print(f"  {r}: {curr_ascii[r][33:57]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
